package handlers

import (
	"context"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5"
)

type User struct {
	ID   int
	Name string
}

func ListUsers(c *gin.Context, conn *pgx.Conn) ([]User, error) {
	rows, err := conn.Query(context.Background(), "SELECT id, name FROM users")
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return pgx.CollectRows(rows, pgx.RowToStructByName[User]), nil
}
